title: Codex State Lookup
description: Inspect the thread/session lookup surfaces for finding and inspecting Codex rollout state.
prompt: Inspect the Codex state lookup surfaces in this repo. Explain how an operator should locate and inspect a thread/session rollout using codex-toys, and mention the command names. Do not use codex exec.

checklist: Inspect the CLI reference and package README for thread-state commands.
Do not require a live thread id for this scenario.
